title: Looking For An Expert To Help Sync Google Sheet to Monday Board
excerpt: Looking for someone to help us sync cells in our Google Sheet to our Monday board. This thread looks like it may do what we require but we are unsure how to implement: Building a Google Sheets Integration

posts.author: MegaphoneNatasha (Natasha)
posts.cookedHtml: Looking for someone to help us sync cells in our Google Sheet to our Monday board. This thread looks like it may do what we require but we are unsure how to implement: Building a Google Sheets Integration

posts.author: timlittletech (Tim Little)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @MegaphoneNatasha Welcome to the monday community!

I’d love to sit down with you and discuss this integration.
looking through that link you posted that all seems to be based on creating VBA/Macros, however I would suggest a different simpler route using integromat. I’ve helped lots of folks set up these types of integrations using that tool. If you are open to a different method than what was posted in that google sheets integration forum I’d love to help you out!

you can schedule a call with me here to discuss: Calendly - Tim Little

Best!

posts.author: Mykola (Mykola Pustovoychenko)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @MegaphoneNatasha

If this is still relevant for you, we have recently released a product for syncing Google Sheet with monday.com board: resynced.io

It allows you to configure which data you’d like to sync and in which direction (from board to spreadsheet, from spreadsheet to board, or in both directions).

Please find the app here: resynced.io - monday.com Marketplace

Should you have any questions feel free to reach out to me anytime.
